# DavidTheBailGuy.Com — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A bail bonds service focused on clarity and accessibility, designed to make a typically stressful and confusing legal process easy to understand for everyday people. The website should be modern and clean, optimized for search engines and voice search assistants like Siri, ensuring clients can quickly find help when they need it most.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Stressed about jail? Our affordable bail bonds are available 24 hours to walk you through the process step by step. Call now for fast, friendly release help.

### Services
https://example.com/services
Explore our simple, transparent bail bond services designed for real people. From low cost bonds to discount options, we make freedom affordable and fast.

### About
https://example.com/about
Meet David, your clear-voice guide through the bail bond maze. We break down complex legal steps into plain English so you can act fast and worry less.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Need immediate release? Reach out anytime for affordable bail bonds with zero confusing jargon. One call gets the ball rolling—contact David now.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel, required)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About DavidTheBailGuy.Com
A bail bonds service focused on clarity and accessibility, designed to make a typically stressful and confusing legal process easy to understand for everyday people. The website should be modern and clean, optimized for search engines and voice search assistants like Siri, ensuring clients can quickly find help when they need it most.

## Target Audience
- Family Members of Detainees
- Criminal Defense Attorneys
- Young Bail Seekers

## Industry
Legal Services / Bail Bonds

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
